sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10222" key="a)nticu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιξύω</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[ῡ]</foreign>, <sense id="n10222.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scrape in turn,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. τὸν ξύοντα</foreign> 'claw me, claw thee', <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:149" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">149</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.84J.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
